reviews.review_description: Really boring, gets repetitive. Gets really laggy towards the later stages and for some reason, in the lobby where you spawn your a gorilla. The horns mechanism could be better, it’s really hard if you try to move with the horns and it’s a 0 skill game which sucks. The game is a clicker type game where you keep pressing the A button. I think it would be cool if you have to move your head down to hit the blocks. The map is also really boring. I see the idea I just think it’s not done too well. I think this game would be good as an rpg game. Overall, the game isn’t good but isn’t terrible.

reviews.review_title: I have already beaten this game
reviews.review_description: I have lava horns which you need 30,000 strength to get it and this game is well talented and good gameplay
